messages.content: What is the distribution of chemical superclasses in the LCMS features annotated by CANOPUS identified from Desmodium heterophyllum extracts?

messages.name: Entry_Agent
messages.content: Starting the processing of the question: What is the distribution of chemical superclasses in the LCMS features annotated by CANOPUS identified from Desmodium heterophyllum extracts?

messages.name: Validator
messages.content: The question is valid.

messages.name: ENPKG_agent
messages.content: "Desmodium heterophyllum, http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q10770714, Wikidata"

outputs.query:
PREFIX ns1: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/kg/>
PREFIX ns2: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/module/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>

SELECT ?superclass (COUNT(?superclass) AS ?count)
WHERE {
    ?rawMaterial ns1:has_wd_id wd:Q10770714 .
    ?rawMaterial ns1:has_lab_process ?labExtract .
    ?labExtract ns1:has_LCMS ?analysis .
    ?analysis ns1:has_lcms_feature_list ?feature_list .
    ?feature_list ns1:has_lcms_feature ?feature .
    ?feature ns1:has_canopus_annotation ?annotation .
    ?annotation ns1:has_canopus_npc_superclass ?superclass .
}
GROUP BY ?superclass

messages.content: What are the retention times and adduct types of LCMS features from Desmodium heterophyllum annotated by SIRIUS with a cosmic score greater than 0.4??

messages.name: Entry_Agent
messages.content: Starting the processing of the question: What are the retention times and adduct types of LCMS features from Desmodium heterophyllum annotated by SIRIUS with a cosmic score greater than 0.4?

messages.name: Validator
messages.content: The question is valid.

messages.name: ENPKG_agent
messages.content: "Desmodium heterophyllum, http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q10770714, Wikidata"

outputs.query:
PREFIX ns1: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/kg/>
  PREFIX ns2: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/module/>

  SELECT ?retentionTime ?adduct
  WHERE {
      ?rawMaterial ns1:has_wd_id <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q10770714> .
      ?rawMaterial ns1:has_lab_process ?labExtract .
      ?labExtract ns1:has_LCMS ?analysis .
      ?analysis ns1:has_lcms_feature_list ?featureList .
      ?featureList ns1:has_lcms_feature ?feature .
      ?feature ns1:has_retention_time ?retentionTime .
      ?feature ns1:has_sirius_annotation ?siriusAnnotation .
      ?siriusAnnotation ns1:has_cosmic_score ?cosmicScore .
      ?siriusAnnotation ns1:has_adduct ?adduct .
      FILTER(?cosmicScore > 0.4)
  }

messages.content: Retrieve the top 5 tissues used to produce lab extracts that contain compounds with inhibition activity greater than 70% against Leishmania donovani target at 10 µg/mL.

messages.name: Entry_Agent
messages.content: Starting the processing of the question: Retrieve the top 5 tissues used to produce lab extracts that contain compounds with inhibition activity greater than 70% against Leishmania donovani target at 10 µg/mL.

messages.name: Validator
messages.content: The question is valid.

messages.name: ENPKG_agent
messages.content: "Leishmania donovani, https://www.ebi.ac.uk/chembl/target_report_card/CHEMBL367, ChEMBLTarget"

outputs.query:
PREFIX ns1: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/kg/>
PREFIX ns2: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/module/>

SELECT ?tissue (COUNT(?labExtract) AS ?count)
WHERE {
    ?labExtract ns2:has_bioassay_results ?bioAssayResult .
    ?bioAssayResult ns2:inhibition_percentage ?inhibitionPercentage ;
                    ns2:target_id <https://www.ebi.ac.uk/chembl/target_report_card/CHEMBL367> .
    FILTER(?inhibitionPercentage > 70)
    ?rawMaterial ns1:has_lab_process ?labExtract ;
                 ns2:has_tissue ?tissue .
}
GROUP BY ?tissue
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 5

messages.content: Retrieve the top-10 lab extracts with the most unique features detected (minimum feature area intensity of 500,000).

messages.name: Entry_Agent
messages.content: Starting the processing of the question: Retrieve the top-10 lab extracts with the most unique features detected (minimum feature area intensity of 500,000).

messages.name: Validator
messages.content: The question is valid.

outputs.query:
PREFIX ns1: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/kg/>
SELECT ?labExtract (COUNT(DISTINCT ?feature) AS ?uniqueFeatures)
WHERE {
    ?labExtract ns1:has_LCMS ?analysis .
    ?analysis ns1:has_lcms_feature_list ?feature_list .
    ?feature_list ns1:has_lcms_feature ?feature .
    ?feature ns1:has_feature_area ?featureArea .
    FILTER(?featureArea >= 500000)
}
GROUP BY ?labExtract
ORDER BY DESC(?uniqueFeatures)
LIMIT 10

PREFIX ns1: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/kg/>

  SELECT ?feature
  WHERE {
      ?analysis a ns1:LCMSAnalysisPos .
      ?analysis ns1:has_lcms_feature_list ?feature_list .

  } ORDER BY DESC(?area)

Which plant has extracts containing compounds that demonstrated inhibition rates above 50% against Trypanosoma cruzi and are above 800 Da in mass? Provide the lab extracts

messages.name: Entry_Agent
messages.content: Starting the processing of the question: Which plant has extracts containing compounds that demonstrated inhibition rates above 50% against Trypanosoma cruzi and are above 800 Da in mass? Provide the lab extracts.

messages.name: Validator
messages.content: The question is valid. It is related to the ENPKG nodes/entities (Raw Material, Lab Extract, BioAssayResult, Chemical Entity). The question asks for information about plant extracts containing compounds that have demonstrated a certain level of inhibition against a specific target and have a certain mass, which can be retrieved from the ENPKG.

messages.name: ENPKG_agent
messages.content: "Trypanosoma cruzi, https://www.ebi.ac.uk/chembl/target_report_card/CHEMBL368, ChEMBLTarget"

outputs.query:
PREFIX ns1: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/kg/>
  PREFIX ns2: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/module/>

  SELECT ?plant ?labExtract
  WHERE {
      ?labExtract ns1:has_LCMS ?analysis .
      ?analysis ns1:has_lcms_feature_list ?feature_list .
      ?feature_list ns1:has_lcms_feature ?feature .
      ?feature ns1:has_parent_mass ?mass .
      FILTER(?mass > 800)
      ?labExtract ns2:has_bioassay_results ?bioAssayResult .
      ?bioAssayResult ns2:inhibition_percentage ?inhibition .
      FILTER(?inhibition > 50)
      ?bioAssayResult ns2:target_id <https://www.ebi.ac.uk/chembl/target_report_card/CHEMBL368> .
      ?rawMaterial ns1:has_lab_process ?labExtract .
      ?rawMaterial ns1:submitted_taxon ?plant .
  }

outputs.query:
PREFIX ns1: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/kg/>
PREFIX ns2: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/module/>

SELECT ?smiles ?wd_id
WHERE {
    ?rawMaterial ns1:has_wd_id <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q8008828> .
    ?rawMaterial ns1:has_lab_process ?labExtract .
    ?labExtract ns1:has_LCMS ?analysis .
    ?analysis ns1:has_lcms_feature_list ?feature_list .
    ?feature_list ns1:has_lcms_feature ?feature .
    ?feature ns1:has_sirius_annotation ?annotation .
    ?annotation ns1:has_InChIkey2D ?InChIkey2D .
    ?InChIkey2D ns1:is_InChIkey2D_of ?chemicalEntity .
    ?chemicalEntity ns1:has_smiles ?smiles ;
                    ns1:has_wd_id ?wd_id .
    ?feature ns1:has_parent_mass ?mass .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?mass)
LIMIT 1

SELECT ?wd_id ?usi

    ?rawMaterial ns1:has_wd_id <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q10770714> ;

 ?labExtract ns2:has_bioassay_results ?assayResult .

outputs.query:
PREFIX ns1: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/kg/>
  PREFIX ns2: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/module/>
  PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>

  SELECT ?spec2vecPeak ?spec2vecLoss (COUNT(?spec2vecPeak) AS ?peakFrequency) (COUNT(?spec2vecLoss) AS ?lossFrequency)
  WHERE {
      ?rawMaterial ns1:has_wd_id wd:Q15376858 .
      ?rawMaterial ns1:has_lab_process ?labExtract .
      ?labExtract ns1:has_LCMS ?analysis .
      ?analysis ns1:has_lcms_feature_list ?featureList .
      ?featureList ns1:has_lcms_feature ?feature .
      ?feature ns1:has_spec2vec_doc ?spec2vecDoc .
      ?spec2vecDoc ns1:has_spec2vec_peak ?spec2vecPeak .
      ?spec2vecDoc ns1:has_spec2vec_loss ?spec2vecLoss .
  } GROUP BY ?spec2vecPeak ?spec2vecLoss 
 ORDER BY DESC(?peakFrequency) DESC(?lossFrequency)
 LIMIT 1

Which ChEMBL documents cited in ChEMBL assay results involve compounds (identified by InChIKeys) that are also observed in SIRIUS structural annotations within lab extracts, and which lab extracts contain the highest number of these shared compounds?

messages.name: Entry_Agent
messages.content: Starting the processing of the question: Which ChEMBL documents cited in ChEMBL assay results involve compounds (identified by InChIKeys) that are also observed in SIRIUS structural annotations within lab extracts, and which lab extracts contain the highest number of these shared compounds?

messages.name: Validator
messages.content: The question is valid.

outputs.query:
PREFIX ns1: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/kg/>
  PREFIX ns2: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/module/>

  SELECT ?chemblDocument ?labExtract (COUNT(?InChIkey2D) AS ?sharedCompoundCount)
  WHERE {
      ?labExtract ns1:has_LCMS ?analysis .
      ?analysis ns1:has_lcms_feature_list ?featureList .
      ?featureList ns1:has_lcms_feature ?feature .
      ?feature ns1:has_sirius_annotation ?siriusAnnotation .
      ?siriusAnnotation ns1:has_InChIkey2D ?InChIkey2D .

      ?InChIkey2D ns1:is_InChIkey2D_of ?chemicalEntity .
      ?chemicalEntity ns2:has_chembl_id ?chemblChemical .

      ?chemblChemical ns2:has_chembl_activity ?assayResult .
      ?assayResult ns2:stated_in_document ?chemblDocument .
  }
  GROUP BY ?chemblDocument ?labExtract
  ORDER BY DESC(?sharedCompoundCount)

messages.content: What are the Wikidata IDs of chemical entities that have ChEMBL activity against Trypanosoma cruzi target?

messages.name: ENPKG_agent

outputs.query:
PREFIX ns1: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/kg/>
  PREFIX ns2: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/module/>

  SELECT ?wd_id
  WHERE {
      ?chemicalEntity ns2:has_chembl_id ?chemblChemical .
      ?chemblChemical ns2:has_chembl_activity ?assayResults .
      ?assayResults ns2:target_id <https://www.ebi.ac.uk/chembl/target_report_card/CHEMBL368> .
      ?chemicalEntity ns1:has_wd_id ?wd_id .
  }

List the top 3 lab extracts with the highest number of unique compounds annotated by CANOPUS with a probability greater than 0.9.

messages.name: Entry_Agent
messages.content: Starting the processing of the question: List the top 3 lab extracts with the highest number of unique compounds annotated by CANOPUS with a probability greater than 0.9.

messages.name: Validator
messages.content: The question is valid.

outputs.query:
PREFIX ns1: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/kg/>

SELECT ?labExtract (COUNT(DISTINCT ?compound) AS ?uniqueCompounds)
WHERE {
    ?labExtract ns1:has_LCMS ?analysis .
    ?analysis ns1:has_lcms_feature_list ?featureList .
    ?featureList ns1:has_lcms_feature ?feature .
    ?feature ns1:has_canopus_annotation ?annotation .
    ?annotation ns1:has_canopus_npc_class ?compound .
    ?annotation ns1:has_canopus_npc_class_prob ?probability .
    FILTER(?probability > 0.9)
}
GROUP BY ?labExtract
ORDER BY DESC(?uniqueCompounds)
LIMIT 3

outputs.query:
PREFIX ns1: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/kg/>

  SELECT ?wd_id
  WHERE {
      ?rawMaterial ns1:has_wd_id <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q15376858> .
      ?rawMaterial ns1:has_lab_process ?labExtract .
      ?labExtract ns1:has_LCMS ?analysis .
      ?analysis ns1:has_lcms_feature_list ?feature_list .
      ?feature_list ns1:has_lcms_feature ?feature .
      ?feature ns1:has_sirius_annotation ?annotation .
      ?annotation ns1:has_InChIkey2D ?InChIkey2D .
      ?InChIkey2D ns1:is_InChIkey2D_of ?chemicalEntity .
      ?chemicalEntity ns1:has_npc_pathway <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/kg/npc_Terpenoids> .
      ?chemicalEntity ns1:has_wd_id ?wd_id .
  }

messages.content: What are the most frequent adducts of LCMS features annotated by SIRIUS detected in positive ionization mode from Tabernaemontana coffeoides?

messages.name: Entry_Agent
messages.content: Starting the processing of the question: What are the most frequent adducts of LCMS features annotated by SIRIUS detected in positive ionization mode from Tabernaemontana coffeoides?

messages.name: Validator
messages.content: The question is valid.

messages.name: ENPKG_agent
messages.content: "Tabernaemontana coffeoides, http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q15376858, Wikidata"

outputs.query:
PREFIX ns1: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/kg/>
  PREFIX ns2: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/module/>

  SELECT ?adduct (COUNT(?adduct) AS ?frequency)
  WHERE {
      ?rawMaterial ns1:has_wd_id <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q15376858> .
      ?rawMaterial ns1:has_lab_process ?labExtract .
      ?labExtract ns1:has_LCMS ?lcmsAnalysis .
      ?lcmsAnalysis a ns1:LCMSAnalysisPos .
      ?lcmsAnalysis ns1:has_lcms_feature_list ?featureList .
      ?featureList ns1:has_lcms_feature ?feature .
      ?feature ns1:has_sirius_annotation ?annotation .
      ?annotation ns1:has_adduct ?adduct .
  }
  GROUP BY ?adduct
  ORDER BY DESC(?frequency)

messages.content: What are the CANOPUS annotations for pairs of features from Desmodium heterophyllum extracts that share a cosine similarity score greater than 0.8? Provide the features and annotations for each feature.

messages.name: Entry_Agent
messages.content: Starting the processing of the question: What are the CANOPUS annotations for pairs of features from Desmodium heterophyllum extracts that share a cosine similarity score greater than 0.8? Provide the features and annotations for each feature.

messages.name: Validator
messages.content: The question is valid.

messages.name: ENPKG_agent
messages.content: "Desmodium heterophyllum, http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q10770714, Wikidata"

outputs.query:
PREFIX ns1: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/kg/>
  PREFIX ns2: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/module/>

  SELECT ?feature1 ?feature2 ?annotation1 ?annotation2 
  WHERE {
      ?rawMaterial ns1:has_wd_id <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q10770714> .
      ?rawMaterial ns1:has_lab_process ?labExtract .
      ?labExtract ns1:has_LCMS ?analysis .
      ?analysis ns1:has_lcms_feature_list ?featureList .
      ?featureList ns1:has_lcms_feature ?feature1, ?feature2 .
      ?pair ns1:has_member ?feature1, ?feature2 .
      ?pair ns1:has_cosine ?cosine .
      FILTER(?cosine > 0.8)
      ?feature1 ns1:has_canopus_annotation ?annotation1 .
      ?feature2 ns1:has_canopus_annotation ?annotation2 .
  }
